name: Absolute Hypnosis
description:
When your grandfather — a man you never knew — dies, you inherit more than a name. An ancient family curse awakens: a demon named Hypno, unseen by all but you, now whispers in your mind. With his pendulum and your command, any mind can be broken and remade. The world is yours… if you dare take it.

Join my Discord Server, with amazing Creators! (Click the Image)
creator: TaaxR
